title: eriophyllum nubigenum
intro: Eriophyllum nubigenum, also known as the mountain woolly sunflower, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Eriophyllum nubigenum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eriophyllum nubigenum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
